tagline: Every song deserves a guardian. Become part of music history.
description: This is not a donation. It's an invitation to become a modern-day patron of the arts—a Digital Curator who ensures a piece of music outlasts the algorithm. Your name, etched into the permanent Legacy Liner Notes, stands as a testament to the music that moved you.

tiers.name: Single Guardian
tiers.description: Covers the DistroKid Legacy fee for one track. Your name is permanently listed as the Guardian of that song.

tiers.name: Album Guardian
tiers.description: Covers the Legacy fee for an entire album (up to 35 tracks). You get the 'Dedicated To' credit on the album's listing.

guardians.dedication: This song carried me through the hardest year of my life.
For the late nights and early mornings. This album is our soundtrack.
